question: Can measuring tool invocation-vs-reference gap identify zombie tools?
expect: >=10 tools with 0 invocations but referenced in automation. Falsified if <5.
actual: 34 tools (30.6%) zero invocation: 9 zombies (102.5K) + 25 orphans (479.5K). Dead code 13.8% vs 5% threshold. Root cause: no L-601 creation-time enforcement.
diff: Expected >=10: CONFIRMED with 34 (3.4x). Ch6 Goodhart fully characterized.
